creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Summary

Ilya Etingof, author of the PySNMP suite of projects, has shown no evidence of activity since 2020-04-21 [0] [1]. The primary website for the projects, snmplabs.com, has been degraded or inaccessible beginning in 2020-07 [1]. The domain name registration expired on 2020-12-03, and as of 2021-02-07 is registered [3] to an entity with no apparently relationship to the PySNMP projects.

[0] https://github.com/etingof?tab=overview&from=2020-12-01&to=2020-12-31
[1] https://stackexchange.com/users/1205218/ilya-etingof?tab=activity
[2] https://github.com/etingof/snmplabs.com/issues
[3] https://whois.domaintools.com/snmplabs.com


Affected ports

devel/py-pyasn1
net-mgmt/py-pysnmp
net-mgmt/py-pysnmp-mibs
net-mgmt/py-snmpclitools
net-mgmt/py-pysmi
